fields.label: Minimum Estimated Minutes
fields.description: Flat daily floor, used as the fallback when the per-weekday minimum below is 0. Blank/0 = fall back to the brand/global floor.

fields.label: Min Minutes Monday
fields.description: 0 = fall back to the flat minimum, then the brand/global floor.
